title: AN ACT CHANGING THE NAME OF MAMBULO NUEVO ELEMENTARY SCHOOL IN THE MUNICIPALITY OF LIBMANAN, PROVINCE OF CAMARINES SUR, TO SAN ANTONIO ELEMENTARY SCHOOL.

chunks.text:
H. NO. 6096 / 60 OG No. 50, 8261 (December 14, 1964)

[ REPUBLIC ACT NO. 3988, June 18, 1964 ]

AN ACT CHANGING THE NAME OF MAMBULO NUEVO ELEMENTARY SCHOOL IN THE MUNICIPALITY OF LIBMANAN, PROVINCE OF CAMARINES SUR, TO SAN ANTONIO ELEMENTARY SCHOOL.

Be it enacted by the Senate and House of Representatives of the Philippines in Congress assembled:

SECTION 1. The name of Mambulo Nuevo Elementary School in the Municipality of Libmanan, Province of Camarines Sur, is hereby changed to San Antonio Elementary School.

SEC. 2. This Act shall take effect upon its approval.

Approved, June 18, 1964.
